extraction_or_definition: Estimate whether the person is a patient from appearance or predefined role information; in the thesis prototype, VQA output was converted to a triangular fuzzy number.
used_for: Distinguishing patients from staff and weighting risk evaluation toward monitored patients.
paper_note: Mention as an example of patient-context static features. Implementation details such as BLIP/VQA can be omitted or moved to appendix if not central.

feature_ja: 年齢層・年齢に関する危険度
extraction_or_definition: Estimate age group such as young, middle-aged, or old; in the thesis prototype, linguistic output was mapped to a triangular fuzzy number.
used_for: Representing patient-side vulnerability that affects the risk of the same action.
paper_note: Use neutral wording such as 'older patient' or 'age-related vulnerability' rather than simply 'old patient'.

feature_ja: 立ち上がり動作との類似度
extraction_or_definition: Calculate similarity between the observed pose and predefined risky-action poses; in the thesis prototype, pose features were obtained from body keypoints.
used_for: Detecting risky behaviors and behaviors similar to predefined dangerous actions.
paper_note: This is a core patient-context dynamic feature and should remain in figures and tables.

feature_ja: その他の事前定義した危険動作
extraction_or_definition: Calculate similarity to each predefined risky action such as face touching or reaching behavior, depending on the scenario.
used_for: Extending the model beyond a single action such as standing up.
paper_note: Keep this as a general row if the paper does not list all actions.

extraction_or_definition: Calculate the distance between the patient position and the nearest handrail or support object.
used_for: Representing whether support is available in the surrounding environment.
paper_note: Important for visual correspondence with problem/solution figures; keep this feature explicit.

feature_ja: 車椅子の有無・車椅子に関する条件
extraction_or_definition: Detect or set the presence of a wheelchair near or used by the patient.
value_type: Existence probability / binary or fuzzy feature
used_for: Representing patient mobility context and possible fall or transfer risk.
paper_note: Keep this feature explicit because it is visually recognizable and supports the spatial-context argument.

feature_en: IV pole or medical device presence
feature_ja: 点滴ポール等の医療器具の有無
extraction_or_definition: Detect or set the presence of objects that can increase risk when the patient moves.
value_type: Existence probability / binary or fuzzy feature
used_for: Capturing hazardous surrounding objects that modify the risk of patient behavior.
paper_note: Include if it appears in scenarios or questionnaire; otherwise mark as optional example.

extraction_or_definition: Calculate or set the presence and position of nearby support furniture such as a chair or cane.
used_for: Representing whether the environment provides support or obstruction.
paper_note: Useful for explaining why the same standing-up action can have lower risk when support is available.

feature_ja: 最も近いスタッフとの距離
extraction_or_definition: Calculate relative distance between the patient and the nearest staff member.
used_for: Representing whether immediate support is available.
paper_note: Core spatial-context feature; should be explicit in figures and evaluation.

feature_ja: スタッフの視線・患者を見ているか
extraction_or_definition: Estimate whether the patient is likely to be within staff attention or field of view; in a simplified implementation, this can be approximated by staff direction and relative position.
used_for: Representing whether the patient is actually being monitored, not only whether staff are physically nearby.
paper_note: Use wording such as 'staff attention' or 'visibility' rather than only 'direction'.

feature_ja: スタッフによる直接支援
extraction_or_definition: Represent whether a staff member is directly assisting the patient during the action, based on proximity and observed support condition.
used_for: Reducing notification priority when the risky action is already supported by staff.
paper_note: Useful for the problem-setting figure: standing up with support can have lower notification priority.

feature_ja: 属性リスクと動作リスクの統合
extraction_or_definition: Aggregate patient-context factors using AHP weights and/or fuzzy rules.
used_for: Intermediate risk node representing patient-side risk.
paper_note: This is not a raw feature but should be included to clarify the hierarchy.

feature_ja: 周辺物体リスクと周辺スタッフリスクの統合
extraction_or_definition: Aggregate spatial-context factors using AHP weights and/or fuzzy rules.
used_for: Intermediate risk node representing surrounding environmental risk.
paper_note: This is important for explaining staff-specific emphasis on spatial context.

feature_ja: 内的リスクと外的リスクの統合
extraction_or_definition: Aggregate internal and external risk to determine the final risk score and notification priority.
paper_note: This is the final output used for evaluation and notification generation.
